title: 11th Arunachal Pradesh Assembly
summary: The Eleventh Legislative Assembly of Arunachal Pradesh is constituted after the 2024 Arunachal Pradesh Legislative Assembly elections, which were concluded on 19 April 2024.
text:
The Eleventh Legislative Assembly of Arunachal Pradesh is constituted after the 2024 Arunachal Pradesh Legislative Assembly elections, which were concluded on 19 April 2024.

Notable positions
The present assembly is the Eleventh Legislative Assembly of Arunachal Pradesh.
